message:
fix(freeze): resolve fclosure/cpool dispatch issues for anonymous functions

Key fixes:
- Remove incorrect fallback registration of anonymous bytecodes with parent's
  frozen function, which caused cpool mismatch when closures were called back
- Enable anonymous function registration using anonymous@line_num keys,
  with collision detection for functions on the same line
- Fix check_ctor codegen to use this_val.isObject() instead of this_cv.isObject()
  (CompressedValue doesn't have isObject method)
- Fix fclosure8/fclosure to properly convert CompressedValue locals to JSValue
  array before passing to createClosure
- Add max_arg_idx_used tracking for proper arg_shadow sizing when bytecode
  arg_count doesn't match actual argument usage
- Add base_popped_count resets for proper vstack tracking in dup operations
- Handle StackDepthConflict errors gracefully by skipping unfrozen functions
- Force Relooper for functions with put_array_el due to stack ordering issues

Result: Lodash tests now pass 65/127 (was crashing with cpool errors before).
448/545 anonymous functions are now registered (was 0 before).
